title: Stock Radar: After a 24% correction, Max Healthcare breaks key resistance level; analysts see long-term potential
summary: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd. has broken out of a descending trendline resistance on daily charts, signaling a potential shift in momentum. Experts suggest long-term investors with a high-risk profile consider buying the stock, targeting Rs 1,400 in the next 12 months, with a stop loss at Rs 850.

title: Markets set for bounce after Friday's one-off fall
summary: Sharp decline attributed to index rebalancing trade &nbsp;rather than any fundamental change by analysts . Sustainability of bounce , though, would hinge on geopolitical events&nbsp;

title: In a likely sign of the times, RIL's new hires down by 90k in FY26
summary: Reliance Industries' hiring in FY26 is likely to have been 90,000 lower, signalling a broader shift at large companies towards AI-led productivity, upskilling and leaner teams. While the overall headcount continues to grow, recruiters expect hiring across corporate India to become more selective.
